project_data: Program: Cloud Migration Phase 2. Reporting period: week of 2026-04-13. Sources: JIRA sprint 14 report, 2026-04-14 standup notes, risk register entry R-042, perf test report PT-0414. Accomplishments: 3 of 5 workloads migrated (CM-231, CM-232, CM-233 closed); performance testing for workload 3 passed all benchmarks (PT-0414). Blockers: IAM integration delayed 1 week, pending identity provider configuration (ticket CM-240, owner: IAM team). Risks: R-042 likelihood increased from Low to Medium due to FTE reduction (parental leave effective 2026-04-20). Metrics: budget utilization 62% of annual allocation; sprint velocity 34 points (vs. 40 planned). Next sprint: begin workload 4 migration (CM-241), resolve IAM blocker. Decision needed: approve revised IAM integration timeline (+1 week).
